title: Senior Teacher - Amity University - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Amity University - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!
